questionHtml: State the equation of the straight line obtained using the data.
markschemeHtml:
I = – 0.001631 d + 0.09939

OR

y = – 0.001631 x + 0.09939

Accept correctly rounded values for m and b in equation.

Do not accept “y = mx + b”.

meta.title: State the equation of the straight line obtained using the data.
